evidence: "Just make up a fresh joke, or rework an old one in a new way, and I'm happy."
"The World's End does exactly what it's supposed to... wraps up a (sorta) trilogy with a bang."
"I love this movie. Steve Martin and Lilly Tomlin are hilarious in it."
"I don't care that it looks a little dated."
"It is just so bad. It wasn't funny at all."
"I've loved both earlier movies, and adore Simon Pegg and Nick Frost together."
"I love Jason Mewes. Love Harvey Keitel."
"The actors are inspired and the situations beautifully acted to hilarious effect."
"The lesson here is a good one, that love and marriage take patience."
"It is awesome. I highly recommend watching the series of Firefly and this, they are just great entertainment."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy, particularly enjoying fast-paced and humorous narratives. They show a low sensitivity to production quality and prefer simple storytelling, often valuing emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
